mapper.select: SELECT id, tag_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag FROM osh_seckill_goods_tag WHERE tag_name = #{tagName} AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_seckill_goods_tag (tag_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{tagName}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updateBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT t.tag_name FROM osh_seckill_goods_tag t INNER JOIN osh_seckill_goods_tag_rel r ON t.id = r.tag_id WHERE r.seckill_goods_id = #{seckillGoodsId} AND (r.delete_flag = 0 OR r.delete_flag IS NULL) AND (t.delete_flag = 0 OR t.delete_flag IS NULL) ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.id ASC
